holdings.n: Franklin Institutional U.S. Government Money Market Fund

overview.description: The Franklin Senior Loan ETF Franklin Liberty Senior Loan Fund (FLBL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund investing in USD-denominated senior loans. FLBL was launched on May 30, 2018 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
